problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area may resolve How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
